rationale: The citing paper’s own note explicitly states it “extends Frederick, Lee, and Baskin (2014)” with independent replication evidence and adds a new boundary-condition test (qualitative-verbal representations), indicating substantive engagement rather than a passing mention. This pair is therefore likely important enough for full relation judgment.
